params.description: Original acquired EWF image — Windows 7 x64 'nfury' C: drive (logical NTFS volume, no partition table). Acquired evidence under investigation in case e2e-demo.

result_summary.description: Original acquired EWF image — Windows 7 x64 'nfury' C: drive (logical NTFS volume, no partition table). Acquired evidence under investigation in case e2e-demo.

params.text: Starting e2e-demo triage of Win7-64 'nfury' C: drive. Case is empty (0 findings, 0 timeline). Environment exposes only SIFT tools via run_command (no wintools/RAG/opencti). Plan: register E01, establish OS/time baseline (fsstat + SOFTWARE/SYSTEM hives), enumerate accounts (SAM), program execution (Prefetch/Amcache/$MFT), persistence (Run keys/services/tasks), user activity (browser/recent/USB), then YARA IOC sweep over surfaced artifacts. All evidence access via gateway raw path /cases/e2e-demo/evidence-raw/ewf1 (logical NTFS, use fsstat/fls/istat/icat, not mmls). Findings stage DRAFT with audit_ids:[] + supporting_commands per case CLAUDE.md.

E01 registered (sha256 a5df0b38ec699656e8c9925ffa515945288aaa32cd29c284fb519cf06d1589c7). Environment exposes only SIFT tools via run_command. Objective A first: establish OS build/hostname/timezone/install/shutdown baseline before interpreting timestamps. Will fsstat the gateway raw path /cases/e2e-demo/evidence-raw/ewf1 (logical NTFS, no partition table), then extract SOFTWARE/SYSTEM registry hives via icat for OS profile + timezone. Findings staged DRAFT with audit_ids:[] + supporting_commands per case CLAUDE.md.

Located core hives: SYSTEM(57506,15.7MB complete), SOFTWARE(57504, true size 54,263,808B but icat save_output capped at 50MiB → tail ~1.8MB truncated), SAM(57500,256KB complete), SECURITY(57502), DEFAULT(57498). 8 user profiles found: Administrator, Default, Public, nfury, rsydow, tdungan, vibranium, SRL-Helpdesk. Hostname hint from McAfee logs: WKS-WIN764BITB. SOFTWARE truncation accepted for now since OS-version/Run keys are in early hbins; will re-extract if a late-hive RECmd query fails. Next: parse hives with EZ tools (RECmd/AppCompatCacheParser) emitting CSV to files, then grep targeted values to keep context lean. Establishing OS build, computer name, timezone, install date, shutdown for time baseline.

ROOT CAUSE of RegRipper failures: run_command sanitizes stdout to UTF-8, so save_output/icat produce corrupted hives (on-disk copies are LARGER than true sizes: SAM 268217 vs 262144, SOFTWARE 69.9MB vs 54.26MB — high bytes expanded to U+FFFD). The regf ASCII header survives so `file` mislabels them as valid, but the binary body is mangled and unparseable. Pivot: extract non-resident files with `dd of=<file>` carving by NTFS cluster run (bs=4096, skip=startcluster, count=nclusters) — dd writes the file directly, bypassing stdout sanitization. SAM is contiguous (clusters 1948109-1948172). Will validate dd method on SAM via samparse, then carve SYSTEM/SOFTWARE (checking contiguity from istat runlists; reconstruct fragmented runs if needed). This is a methodology constraint of the gateway, not an evidence issue.

forensic-critic verdict: F-jgore-001 VERIFIED (all values match raw winver/compname/timezone/shutdown; 'x64' is a sound one-hop inference from amd64fre in BuildLabEx). F-jgore-002 VERIFIED (samparse/profilelist all confirmed verbatim; MEDIUM confidence well-calibrated). Two wording refinements to apply at examiner approval: (1) F-001 mark x64 as inferred; (2) F-002 change 'This is the profile of an attacker-created backdoor' to 'consistent with an attacker-created backdoor' pending Security-event-log corroboration (4720/4732/4624 Type10). Carrying these forward. Now proceeding to Objective C: program execution & initial access — shimcache (appcompatcache), HKLM/HKCU Run keys, locate+parse Amcache and Prefetch, flag oddly-placed executables.

forensic-critic verdict for F-003/F-004/F-005. F-003 VERIFIED: all claims match raw istat, hashes, file, and strings; HIGH justified. F-004 VERIFIED: Run key plus At1/At2 confirmed verbatim via live re-run on SOFTWARE.bin; critic notes the stored audit head for run sift-035 was truncated before the Wow6432Node key, but the live re-run confirms it (provenance-continuity note for examiner, no factual error). F-005 PARTIALLY-SUPPORTED: the exclusion conclusion is fully correct (svchost and dllhost are legitimate per $SI/$FN/TrustedInstaller/size, and the dllhost directory is absent, confirmed by both fls-on-inode and a grep over the full recursive listing = true evidence of absence), so confidence remains HIGH. One wording fix for the examiner at approval: the supporting_command excerpt for the inode-23430 fls quotes the stderr text about $IDX_ROOT which was present in the live run stderr I observed but is not preserved in the stored audit stdout; reword to the verifiable fact that fls returned exit code 1 with no stdout (inode 23430 is not a directory). Action: no withdrawal or downgrade needed; pass the correction note to the examiner. The F-006 through F-009 critic is still running.

forensic-critic verdict for F-006/F-007/F-008/F-009. F-006 VERIFIED (UserAssist LastWrite, CompMgmtLauncher, RemoteDesktop, cmd all confirmed; reconstructed NTUSER_SRL.bin parsed cleanly at 569344 bytes; minor: observation list omits StickyNotes/MediaCenter, which is a representative not exhaustive list). F-007 VERIFIED with scope note: usbstor plugin reads only ControlSet001, so qualify the 'only USB device' claim as 'only device in USBSTOR under ControlSet001'. F-008 VERIFIED, no corrections, interpretations correctly hedged as leads. F-009 PARTIALLY-SUPPORTED, two corrections: (1) EvtxECmd is NOT on the sift gateway (where run_command executes; ls of zimmermantools dir failed, check_tools false) but the critic found EvtxECmd present on the analysis host at /usr/local/bin/EvtxECmd with dotnet 9 — so reframe the gap as gateway-scoped: EVTX parsing is feasible as a follow-up by carving Security.evtx via run_command dd and parsing with EvtxECmd on the host/SIFT box, not via the gateway run_command surface. (2) the Security.evtx istat size/run values were truncated in the stored audit head; I re-ran istat 57679 with save_output to persist a hashed full record closing that provenance gap. Corrections for examiner: F-006 add StickyNotes/MediaCenter or mark list representative; F-007 qualify USB claim to ControlSet001; F-009 reframe EvtxECmd availability as gateway-scoped and cite the new persisted istat. No findings withdrawn or downgraded; all conclusions stand.
